message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

rectangle "Client" as Client
rectangle "TEAPServer" as TEAPServer

Client --> TEAPServer : EAP-Request/Identity
TEAPServer --> Client : EAP-Response/Type=Identity

Client --> TEAPServer : EAP-Request/Type=TEAP, TEAP Start, Authority-ID TLV
TEAPServer --> Client : EAP-Response/Type=TEAP, TLS(ClientHello)

Client --> TEAPServer : EAP-Request/Type=TEAP, TLS(ServerHello, ServerKeyExchange, ServerHelloDone)
note left of Client : (1) (2)

TEAPServer --> Client : EAP-Response/Type=TEAP, ClientKeyExchange, CertificateVerify, ChangeCipherSpec, Finished)
note left of TEAPServer : (3)

Client --> TEAPServer : EAP-Request/Type=TEAP, TLS(ChangeCipherSpec, Finished), {Crypto-Binding TLV, Result TLV=Success}
TEAPServer --> Client : EAP-Response/Type=TEAP, {Crypto-Binding TLV, Result TLV=Success}

Client --> TEAPServer : EAP-Success

rectangle "Client" as Client2
rectangle "TEAPServer" as TEAPServer2

@enduml
